text: A good friend is someone you should always make time for.
Today you describe the people and places that matter to you.
Reliable
Generous
Charming
Downtown
Crowded
Peaceful

View
Daniel is a friend who never lets you down.
It is a town which sits on a green mountain.
She is the person that helped me move.
It is a square that is full of charming cafes.
Sandra, who is the person you admire most?
My sister. She is the kind of person who is always reliable.
That sounds wonderful. What else is she like?
She is very generous. She lives in a small apartment which is always full of friends.
And where is that apartment? Is it downtown?
Yes, it is downtown, on a charming street that has a lovely view of the park.
The person who I admire most is
There is a place which I will never forget
My favorite spot downtown is a cafe that
He is a person who is very reliable.
She is the friend that always helps me.
It is a town which has a stunning view.
In the morning it is peaceful, but in the evening it gets crowded.
It is a charming place downtown that I love.

Let me tell you about my best friend. His name is Daniel, and he is the kind of person who never lets you down. He is the friend who calls you on your birthday and the one who remembers the small things. Daniel is very reliable; if he says he will be there at eight, he is there at eight. He is also incredibly generous. Last year, when I was moving to a new apartment, he was the only person who spent the whole weekend helping me, and he never asked for anything. The thing that I admire most about him is that he is the same with everyone. People who meet him once remember him for years. A friend who is both reliable and generous is a rare and wonderful thing.

I want to describe a place that I will never forget. A few years ago, I visited a small town which sits on the side of a green mountain. The center is a charming old square that is full of cafes and little shops. In the morning, it is a peaceful place where you can hear the birds and smell fresh bread. But in the evening, the square becomes crowded; it fills with families who walk together after dinner. From the top of the hill, there is a stunning view of the whole valley, and the light at sunset is something that I still remember today. It is not a famous city, but it is a place that feels like home the moment you arrive.

First, say who or what you want to describe. Then add a relative clause that gives the key detail, using who for a person or which for a thing. Next, add one more quality with another clause. After that, give a real example of that quality. Finally, say how that person or place makes you feel.
Reliable
Generous
Charming
Downtown
Crowded
Peaceful
Stunning
View
She is a friend who is very reliable.
It is a town which has a stunning view.
He is the man that fixed my car.
My office is in the center of the city, downtown.
In the early morning, the park is so peaceful.
Our room had a beautiful view of the sea.
